briefdescription.para: CMSIS STM32L4xx Device Peripheral Access Layer Header File.

detaileddescription.para:
MCD Application Team The file is the unique include file that the application programmer is using in the C source code, usually in main.c. This file contains: - Configuration section that allows to select: - The STM32L4xx device used in the target application - To use or not the peripheral's drivers in application code(i.e. code will be based on direct access to peripheral's registers rather than drivers API), this option is controlled by "#define USE_HAL_DRIVER"
